name: Radio
description: A radio button group for single-select choices. Built on Base UI Radio and RadioGroup with StyleX styling.

Group.description: Container that manages which radio is selected.

onValueChange.description: Callback fired when the selected value changes.

disabled.description: Whether the entire group is disabled.

orientation.description: Layout direction of the radio items.

value.description: The value of this radio option.

dataAttributes.data-checked: Present when the radio is selected.
dataAttributes.data-unchecked: Present when the radio is not selected.
dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the radio is disabled.

Indicator.description: The visual dot that appears when the radio is selected.

dataAttributes.data-checked: Present when the parent radio is selected.
dataAttributes.data-unchecked: Present when the parent radio is not selected.

cssRequirements.description: Radio root checked styles and indicator enter/exit animation.

intents.reasoning: Radio is the standard pattern for mutually exclusive choices where all options should be visible.
intents.composition:
<Radio.Group defaultValue="option1">
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="option1"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option 1
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="option2"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option 2
  </label>
</Radio.Group>

intents.reasoning: Radio groups work well for preference or settings where users pick exactly one option from a small set.
intents.composition:
<Radio.Group defaultValue="standard">
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="standard"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Standard
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="express"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Express
  </label>
</Radio.Group>

avoidWhen.reasoning: Use CheckboxGroup when users can select more than one option.
Use Select or Combobox for long lists to save space and improve usability.
Use Switch for a single boolean toggle. Radio is for choosing between labeled options.

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
<Radio.Group defaultValue="a">
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="a"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option A
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="b"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option B
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="c"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option C
  </label>
</Radio.Group>

examples.name: horizontal
examples.code:
<Radio.Group defaultValue="left" orientation="horizontal">
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="left"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Left
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="center"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Center
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="right"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Right
  </label>
</Radio.Group>

examples.name: disabled
examples.code:
<Radio.Group defaultValue="a" disabled>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="a"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option A
  </label>
  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }}>
    <Radio.Root value="b"><Radio.Indicator /></Radio.Root>
    Option B
  </label>
</Radio.Group>
